title: Agent Loops, Persistent Goals, and Durable Work

audience.description: Developers and technical operators building reliable multi-turn agents, persistent Codex goals, tool loops, and restartable long-running workflows.
entryKnowledge: Write basic Python or TypeScript functions and understand JSON, APIs, tests, and command-line tools.
deviceConstraints: Desktop recommended; conceptual labs run locally and no production credentials are required.
accessibilityAssumptions: All equations, diagrams, tables, terminal traces, and code examples require equivalent structured text and full keyboard operation.

placementEvidence: A placement review or prior artifact must demonstrate this entry skill: Write basic Python or TypeScript functions and understand JSON, APIs, tests, and command-line tools.
completionEvidence: Complete and defend all 4 stakeholder projects against their acceptance constraints and rubrics.
Pass the cumulative performance examination at or above 85 percent with changed-case evidence.

includes: Persistent goals, plans, tool loops, termination, recovery, and memory
Human control, subagents, observability, evals, and durable operations

sources.title: OpenAI Codex Manual: Goals and Long-Running Work
sources.scope: Controls persisted goals, automatic continuation, goal commands, planning, and long-running Codex behavior.

sources.title: Anthropic Building Effective Agents
sources.scope: Controls workflow-agent distinctions and simple composable agent patterns.

sources.title: Anthropic Tool Use with Claude
sources.scope: Controls client and server tool loops, stop reasons, schemas, and tool choice.

sources.title: Anthropic Agent Evaluation Guidance
sources.scope: Controls multi-turn environment, trajectory, grader, and regression evaluation practice.

competencies.statement: Distinguish predefined workflows from model-directed agents and choose the simpler sufficient architecture.
misconceptions: Every multi-step automation requires an autonomous agent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish predefined workflows from model-directed agents and choose the simpler sufficient architecture.

competencies.statement: Model the observe, decide, act, and verify cycle with explicit state transitions.
misconceptions: An agent loop is merely repeated prompting.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model the observe, decide, act, and verify cycle with explicit state transitions.

competencies.statement: Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.
misconceptions: Conversation history is the complete system state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.

competencies.statement: Define which effects occur in the model, host, tools, and external services.
misconceptions: The model itself executes every requested action.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define which effects occur in the model, host, tools, and external services.

competencies.statement: State invariants that must hold before and after every loop iteration.
misconceptions: Only the final answer needs validation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: State invariants that must hold before and after every loop iteration.

competencies.statement: Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.
misconceptions: Work longer is a valid measurable goal.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.

competencies.statement: Attach observable success measures, boundaries, and evidence requirements.
misconceptions: A goal is complete when the agent says it is complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Attach observable success measures, boundaries, and evidence requirements.

competencies.statement: Separate current objective, durable constraints, and optional next work.
misconceptions: A goal authorizes any adjacent useful action.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate current objective, durable constraints, and optional next work.

competencies.statement: Revise goals explicitly when new evidence changes scope or feasibility.
misconceptions: The original goal should remain unchanged despite contradictory evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Revise goals explicitly when new evidence changes scope or feasibility.

competencies.statement: Relate mission, milestone, task, and step without losing the terminal outcome.
misconceptions: Every low-level action deserves its own persistent goal.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Relate mission, milestone, task, and step without losing the terminal outcome.

competencies.statement: Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.
misconceptions: A persistent goal is the same as a plan checklist.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.

competencies.statement: Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.
misconceptions: A persistent goal should contain every implementation detail.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.

competencies.statement: Design automatic continuation around verified progress and safe terminal conditions.
misconceptions: Automatic continuation grants broader action authority.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design automatic continuation around verified progress and safe terminal conditions.

competencies.statement: Distinguish active, paused, completed, and genuinely blocked states.
misconceptions: Difficult or unfinished work should be marked blocked immediately.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish active, paused, completed, and genuinely blocked states.

competencies.statement: Preserve goal state, decisions, tests, and next actions across sessions.
misconceptions: The goal sentence alone is a complete handoff.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Preserve goal state, decisions, tests, and next actions across sessions.

competencies.statement: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
misconceptions: A long flat checklist exposes all dependencies.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.

competencies.statement: Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.
misconceptions: A milestone is any convenient stopping point.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.

competencies.statement: Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.
misconceptions: Changing a plan means the original work failed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.

competencies.statement: Identify serial dependencies and safe opportunities for parallel work.
misconceptions: Every task benefits from maximum parallelism.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Identify serial dependencies and safe opportunities for parallel work.

competencies.statement: Pause for user direction only when missing authority or a choice materially changes the outcome.
misconceptions: Agents should ask before every implementation decision.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pause for user direction only when missing authority or a choice materially changes the outcome.

competencies.statement: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
misconceptions: The tool with the closest name is always correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.

competencies.statement: Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
misconceptions: Model-generated tool JSON is trusted application input.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.

competencies.statement: Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
misconceptions: All tool calls can run concurrently.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.

competencies.statement: Update loop state from complete, partial, empty, and conflicting tool results.
misconceptions: No-result and tool-failure states are equivalent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Update loop state from complete, partial, empty, and conflicting tool results.

competencies.statement: Record intended and observed side effects for idempotency and audit.
misconceptions: A successful HTTP status proves the exact side effect occurred.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record intended and observed side effects for idempotency and audit.

competencies.statement: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.
misconceptions: A fluent final message is a success condition.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.

competencies.statement: Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.
misconceptions: Every error deserves another identical retry.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.

competencies.statement: Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.
misconceptions: Token limits alone control every agent cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.

competencies.statement: Detect repeated state, unchanged evidence, and oscillating repairs.
misconceptions: An active agent is progressing whenever it emits output.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect repeated state, unchanged evidence, and oscillating repairs.

competencies.statement: Stop with a resumable state, evidence, and explicit unmet conditions.
misconceptions: When a budget ends, incomplete work should be called complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop with a resumable state, evidence, and explicit unmet conditions.

competencies.statement: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
misconceptions: Immediate unlimited retries maximize reliability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.

competencies.statement: Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
misconceptions: Read-only calls are the only operations that can be retried safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.

competencies.statement: Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
misconceptions: Restarting from the initial prompt is always safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.

competencies.statement: Define compensating actions when atomic rollback is unavailable.
misconceptions: Every external side effect can be rolled back automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define compensating actions when atomic rollback is unavailable.

competencies.statement: Inject timeouts, partial failures, duplicates, and restarts into loop tests.
misconceptions: Happy-path integration tests cover distributed failure behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inject timeouts, partial failures, duplicates, and restarts into loop tests.

competencies.statement: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
misconceptions: More conversation history always improves decisions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.

competencies.statement: Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
misconceptions: Any model inference is safe to save as fact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.

competencies.statement: Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
misconceptions: Semantic similarity alone determines authoritative context.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.

competencies.statement: Compact history into goal, decisions, evidence, unresolved work, and restart commands.
misconceptions: A generic summary preserves operational state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compact history into goal, decisions, evidence, unresolved work, and restart commands.

competencies.statement: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.
misconceptions: Agent convenience justifies indefinite data retention.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.

competencies.statement: Classify actions by reversibility, blast radius, sensitivity, and external impact.
misconceptions: All tool calls have equivalent risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify actions by reversibility, blast radius, sensitivity, and external impact.

competencies.statement: Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.
misconceptions: Approval at session start covers every later action.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.

competencies.statement: Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.
misconceptions: Broad credentials reduce errors without adding risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.

competencies.statement: Apply user corrections immediately without silently broadening the task.
misconceptions: New user context should be queued even when it invalidates current work.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply user corrections immediately without silently broadening the task.

competencies.statement: Implement pause, cancel, revoke, and containment paths that work during tool execution.
misconceptions: A stop button is sufficient without testing cancellation behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement pause, cancel, revoke, and containment paths that work during tool execution.

competencies.statement: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
misconceptions: More agents always finish a task faster.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.

competencies.statement: Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
misconceptions: Subagents automatically inherit every relevant detail.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.

competencies.statement: Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.
misconceptions: Independent agents cannot conflict in a shared workspace.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.

competencies.statement: Verify subagent claims and integrate evidence rather than concatenating outputs.
misconceptions: A subagent final answer is trusted proof.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify subagent claims and integrate evidence rather than concatenating outputs.

competencies.statement: Compare parallel speedup with communication, merge, and review cost.
misconceptions: Parallelism has no overhead or new failure modes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare parallel speedup with communication, merge, and review cost.

competencies.statement: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
misconceptions: Final answers contain enough data to debug agent behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.

competencies.statement: Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
misconceptions: Output quality alone measures an agent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.

competencies.statement: Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
misconceptions: Live production systems are the best first eval environment.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.

competencies.statement: Classify planning, tool, state, recovery, authorization, and communication failures.
misconceptions: All agent failures are prompt failures.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify planning, tool, state, recovery, authorization, and communication failures.

competencies.statement: Compare agent versions by material outcome slices and investigate regressions.
misconceptions: One average score safely determines release readiness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare agent versions by material outcome slices and investigate regressions.

competencies.statement: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
misconceptions: Keeping one process alive makes a workflow durable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.

competencies.statement: Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
misconceptions: Every unfinished goal should poll continuously.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.

competencies.statement: Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
misconceptions: No change during one poll means the workflow is blocked.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.

competencies.statement: Version runbooks, tools, schemas, and migration rules for in-flight work.
misconceptions: Running agents can adopt breaking workflow changes automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version runbooks, tools, schemas, and migration rules for in-flight work.

competencies.statement: Expose current phase, next wake condition, authority, costs, and safe interventions.
misconceptions: Operators only need a binary running indicator.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose current phase, next wake condition, authority, costs, and safe interventions.

competencies.statement: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
misconceptions: An impressive capstone must maximize autonomy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.

competencies.statement: Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.
misconceptions: Goals, plans, and loops can be designed independently.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.

competencies.statement: Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
misconceptions: Safety can be added after the happy path works.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.

competencies.statement: Gate release on scenario, trajectory, security, and recovery evidence.
misconceptions: A demo is adequate release evidence for an agent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Gate release on scenario, trajectory, security, and recovery evidence.

competencies.statement: Defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures.
misconceptions: A technically functioning agent requires no operational explanation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures.
